description.overview: The Anatolian Shepherd is an ancient Turkish breed used to protect livestock from predators like wolves and bears.
description.temperament: Anatolians are independent, protective guardians. Loyal to family but territorial with strangers.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to hip dysplasia and entropion.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Need space to patrol and protect.

verdict.summary: Powerful Turkish guardians bred to protect livestock. Anatolians are independent and territorial - best for rural properties with experienced owners.
